selections.name: Castro (NZ)
selections.reason: Consistent form with a 3rd at Mudgee and 5th at Orange. Strong speed figures make him the obvious threat.

selections.name: Pinero
selections.reason: Improving form, coming off a solid 2nd at Tamworth. Drawn well to feature.

selections.name: Bravalatante
selections.reason: Boxed on steadily for 4th at Dubbo last start. Has minor claims.

selections.name: Smart Scud
selections.reason: Trained by Tier 1 stable, open to improvement after debut 7th at Scone.

danger_horse.name: Millicent Daisy
danger_horse.reason: Led and faded last start but open to improvement.

selections.name: Erion
selections.reason: Racing well with consecutive 2nd place finishes. Edged out late last start, ready to win.

selections.name: Territory Style
selections.reason: Made good headway for 2nd at Wellington. Perfectly placed over the extra distance.

selections.name: Northern Exposure
selections.reason: Resuming from a break. Has placed first-up previously and faces a field lacking depth.

selections.name: Moon Dart
selections.reason: Boxed on steadily for 5th at Wellington. Blinkers may sharpen him up.

danger_horse.name: Corky
danger_horse.reason: Finished 4th on debut at Wellington. Open to natural improvement.

selections.name: Rubelin
selections.reason: Promising 4th on debut at Scone. Fitter now and should appreciate the drop in class.

selections.name: Finest Art
selections.reason: Made ground from midfield for 3rd at Wellington. Consistent and a major player.

selections.name: All Saints
selections.reason: Finished 4th at Wellington last start. Tricky gate but among the top chances.

selections.name: Sibeila
selections.reason: Resuming after a year break. Trial winner recently, watch betting market.

danger_horse.name: Bindaree Lass
danger_horse.reason: Resuming. Showed ability last prep, capable of a solid performance.

selections.name: Strassman
selections.reason: Broke through for a win at Wellington last start. Found form and expected to feature again.

selections.name: The Bentley
selections.reason: Racing well with a 2nd at Grenfell and 4th at Wellington. Sound each-way hope.

selections.name: Litlfela
selections.reason: Finished 4th at Wellington recently. Very fit and ready to show his best.

selections.name: Himeros
selections.reason: Faded to 5th at Orange last start but capable of better in this grade.

danger_horse.name: Indie Mae
danger_horse.reason: Fitter now and can improve without surprising.

selections.name: Micro Mikki
selections.reason: Massive class drop from Randwick Highway and Country Championships. Dominant rating advantage.

selections.name: Red Beryl
selections.reason: Won at Warren recently and drops back from tougher grades. Major player.

selections.name: Turgenev
selections.reason: Ran on strongly for 2nd at Orange last start. Close up recently and commands respect.

selections.name: Stockholm
selections.reason: Won at Dubbo two starts back. Can bounce back from a moderate effort at Mudgee.

danger_horse.name: Sebilla
danger_horse.reason: Resuming. Has class but might need the run. Watch for late market support.

selections.name: Chappolicious
selections.reason: Gave a good sight when 3rd at Wellington. Strong winning chance from a favorable draw.

selections.name: Invincible Salex
selections.reason: Fitter second-up. Won at Muswellbrook last prep and is an excellent winning chance.

selections.name: Line Of Law
selections.reason: Won at Tullibigeal two starts back. Inside draw is a big advantage here.

selections.name: Sidenay
selections.reason: Finished 2nd at Lightning Ridge last start. Capable of another forward showing.

danger_horse.name: Race To Arms
danger_horse.reason: Won at Coonamble last prep. Excellent winning chance if he brings his best.

selections.name: Charlie Magic
selections.reason: Solid 3rd at Dubbo last start. Will need some improvement but right in this.

selections.name: St Roy
selections.reason: Won at Lightning Ridge two starts back. Well placed and a terrific chance to return to form.

selections.name: Friskee Frog
selections.reason: Resuming favorite. Won at Warren last prep and drawn well to feature.

selections.name: Eilrahc
selections.reason: Finished 5th at Orange last start. Rates highly on best form and should be in the mix.

danger_horse.name: Cheap Shot
danger_horse.reason: Consistent form, 3rd at Goulburn last start. Rates highly and worth including.
